title: Recruits Warium
description: Recruits Warium is a compatability mod which gives recruits from the Recruits mod the ability to use guns from Warium
body:
Recruits Warium is a lightweight compatibility addon that bridges the gap between the Recruits mod and Warium. With this addon, your recruits can now equip and effectively use weapons from Warium, giving you more tactical variety and firepower for your armies.

No longer limited to basic gear, your squads can wield the full arsenal of Warium — from close-quarters weapons to ranged firepower — making them stronger, more versatile, and better suited for any battlefield situation.

The mod is highly customizable by going to the config contained in your world folder, you can modify almost every value that this mod affects on the recruits



FAQ:

Q: How Do I Modify The Recruits Behaviour And Weapon Values

A: In saves/{Your World}/serverconfig/recruit-warium-server.toml

Q: Why Won't They Shoot Anti-Material Gun And Submachine Gun?

A: They Are Currently Broken, Trying To Figure Out Fix

Q: Why Aren't They Consuming Ammo?

A: Make Sure To Set RangedRecruitsNeedArrows to true in Recruits Server Config

Q: They Won't Load Weapon With RangedRecruitsNeedArrows set to true?

A: Make Sure You Are Giving Them Bullets And Not Magazines

Q: Why Won't They Shoot The Armor Peeler Launcher?

A: For The Armor Peeler, You Must Load The Launcher Before Giving It To The Recruit Because They Are Different Items

Q: How To Have Them Use Flamethrower?

A: Give Them Buckets Of Petreoleum Instead Of FlameThrower Canisters

⚔️ Features

Full compatibility between Recruits and Warium.

Recruits can now use Warium’s weapons just like the player.

Expands your army’s loadout options for both strategy and roleplay.

Simple, lightweight, and designed for seamless integration.

✅ Requirements

Recruits Mod

Warium Mod
